assumptions.hypothesis: Daily reports should remain freshness-first: prioritize last 72h, allow up to 7d with explicit labeling.
Key claims in daily outputs should be grounded in primary sources (official blog / GitHub release / docs).

assumptions.hypothesis: Diffusion-class action generation (Diffusion Policy, flow matching / pi0, ACT-style chunking) remains the dominant VLA action head paradigm for top-venue papers through 2026. Autoregressive tokenized-action approaches (like ARP, UniPi) will not surpass it on SIMPLER/LIBERO benchmarks without architectural novelty.

World models (UniSim, GR-1, SuSIE, DreamerV3-based) will graduate from auxiliary imagination tools to first-class planning components in VLA by end of 2026, placing world-model-first architectures in the top-5 of SIMPLER or equivalent long-horizon benchmark.
